title: attribution — product analytics
description: Analytics events emitted by the attribution module itself (meta-analytics — the module observing its own capture behavior). Distinct from the domain marketing/analytics events that DOWNSTREAM modules emit using this module's attribution snapshot. Consent tier for most events is `functional` (first-party operational analytics per notifications::consent-tiers.json). The consent-suppression event uses tier `essential` because it's a compliance-integrity signal.

events.name: Attribution Profile Created
events.description: New attribution profile created. first_touch_source_bucket collapses individual sources into { paid / organic / social / referral / direct / email / affiliate / unknown } to avoid high-cardinality labels.

events.name: Attribution Converted
events.description: Identified → converted transition. Powers first-touch vs last-touch revenue-attribution analysis. conversion_value_cents_bucket: 0 / 1-999 / 1000-9999 / 10000+.

events.name: Attribution Churned
events.description: days_inactive_bucket: 90-180 / 180-365 / >365. Baseline churn metric for retention planning.

events.name: Attribution Reset Requested
events.description: GDPR erasure signal. Consent tier essential — data-subject rights cannot be opted-out of tracking. Trigger enum: user_request / admin_action / regulator_request / force_reset.

events.name: Attribution Touchpoint Captured
events.description: High-volume event. Sampled at 10% by default (see feature-flags.json).

events.name: Attribution Consent Suppressed
events.description: Compliance-integrity signal. Consent tier essential — data-processing-fairness metric cannot be opted-out. consent_state_summary: 'marketing_off' / 'advertising_off' / 'both_off' / 'partial'.

notes: Analytics NEVER carry raw utm values, click IDs, or landing page URLs — those are always the bucket variant. Prevents cross-tenant campaign leakage from aggregated analytics data.

user_id + attribution_id + subject_id are NEVER included as properties — attribution is downstream-facing PII-adjacent data. The tenant's product analytics for their own attribution flows through this module's OWN rollup surface (SDUI campaign dashboard), not through Segment.

The `essential` consent tier for Attribution Reset Requested + Attribution Consent Suppressed is deliberate — these are compliance-integrity signals that cannot be opted out (data-subject rights + data-processing-fairness metrics).
The 10% sampling on Attribution Touchpoint Captured is configurable via `attribution.analytics.touchpoint_sample_rate`. Enterprise tenants may raise to 100% for full-fidelity funnel analysis.
